title: SOC 2 Type II Audit
description: Maintain annual SOC 2 Type II audit per AICPA TSC for security/availability/confidentiality.

title: Security Common Criteria
description: Implement common criteria controls for security per SOC 2.

title: Availability Trust Services Criteria
description: Implement availability controls including monitoring, capacity, and DR.

title: Confidentiality Trust Services Criteria
description: Identify, classify, and protect confidential customer information.

title: Privacy Trust Services Criteria
description: Implement privacy controls per AICPA TSC P1 covering notice, choice, collection.

title: ISO 27001 ISMS Certification
description: Establish, implement, maintain, and improve an Information Security Management System.

title: Annual ISMS Risk Assessment
description: Conduct documented information security risk assessments at least annually.

title: Information Asset Inventory
description: Maintain inventory of information assets with classification and ownership.

title: Cryptographic Controls
description: Apply ISO 27001 cryptographic controls including key lifecycle.

title: Secure System Engineering Principles
description: Apply secure system engineering principles for design, implementation, operation.

title: Information Security Incident Response
description: Maintain documented incident response with classification and escalation.

title: ISO 27017 Cloud Security
description: Apply cloud-specific information security controls per ISO 27017.

title: ISO 27018 Cloud PII Protection
description: Apply ISO 27018 PII protection in public clouds acting as PII processors.

title: ISO 27701 Privacy Information
description: Implement Privacy Information Management System per ISO 27701.

title: ISO 22301 Business Continuity
description: Establish BCMS per ISO 22301 for cybersecurity service continuity.

title: NIST Cybersecurity Framework 2.0
description: Adopt NIST Cybersecurity Framework 2.0 with maturity self-assessment.

title: NIST 800-53 Controls
description: Apply NIST SP 800-53 Rev 5 controls for federal contractor engagements.

title: NIST 800-171 CUI Protection
description: Apply 110 controls of NIST SP 800-171 to systems handling CUI.

title: NIST SSDF Secure Software Development
description: Apply NIST SSDF (SP 800-218) secure software development framework.

title: NIST 800-30 Risk Assessment
description: Apply NIST SP 800-30 risk assessment methodology.

title: NIST 800-37 Risk Management Framework
description: Apply NIST RMF for federal information systems.

title: NIST 800-53A Control Assessment
description: Apply NIST SP 800-53A for control assessment procedures.

title: NIST 800-63 Digital Identity
description: Apply NIST SP 800-63 digital identity guidelines (IAL/AAL/FAL).

title: FedRAMP Authorization
description: Maintain FedRAMP authorization (Low/Moderate/High) for federal cloud services.

title: FedRAMP Continuous Monitoring
description: Submit monthly FedRAMP continuous monitoring artifacts.

title: CMMC Level 2/3 Certification
description: Maintain CMMC Level 2 or 3 certification for DoD contractors handling CUI.

title: DFARS 252.204-7012 Cybersecurity
description: Apply DFARS 252.204-7012 cybersecurity for DoD contractor CUI.

title: DFARS 72-Hour Incident Reporting
description: Report cyber incidents to DoD within 72 hours per DFARS.

title: FISMA Compliance
description: Apply FISMA security requirements to federal information systems.

title: Lawful Basis for Customer Data
description: Document lawful basis for cybersecurity customer personal data processing.

title: DSAR Within One Month
description: Respond to data subject access requests within one month.

title: 72-Hour Breach Notification
description: Notify supervisory authority of personal data breach within 72 hours.

title: Data Protection by Design
description: Implement appropriate technical/organizational measures by design and default.

title: Cross-Border Transfer Safeguards
description: Use SCCs or adequacy decisions for personal data transfers outside EEA.

title: EU NIS2 Directive
description: Comply with EU NIS2 Directive cybersecurity obligations for essential entities.

title: NIS2 24-Hour Incident Notification
description: Notify CSIRTs of significant incidents within 24 hours under NIS2.

title: EU DORA Digital Operational Resilience
description: Comply with EU DORA for financial sector ICT risk management.

title: DORA Third-Party ICT Risk
description: Manage third-party ICT risk per DORA Articles 28-30.

title: PCI-DSS for Payment Processors
description: Apply PCI-DSS for cybersecurity vendors handling cardholder data.

title: HIPAA Security Rule for Healthcare Cyber Vendors
description: Apply HIPAA Security Rule when serving healthcare clients with PHI access.

title: GLBA Safeguards Rule
description: Apply GLBA Safeguards Rule when serving financial sector clients.

title: FERPA for Education Cyber Vendors
description: Apply FERPA when serving education clients with student data.

title: ITAR for Defense Cyber Tools
description: Apply ITAR to defense cybersecurity tools and services.

title: EAR Encryption Export Controls
description: Apply EAR Category 5 Part 2 for encryption export controls.

title: Wassenaar Arrangement
description: Apply Wassenaar Arrangement controls to dual-use cybersecurity tools.

title: OFAC Customer Screening
description: Screen cybersecurity customers and partners against OFAC SDN list.

title: FCPA Anti-Bribery
description: Avoid corrupt payments to foreign officials in international cybersecurity sales.

title: OWASP Top 10 Mitigation
description: Mitigate OWASP Top 10 web application security risks in delivered software.

title: OWASP API Top 10
description: Mitigate OWASP API Top 10 risks in delivered API services.

title: OWASP ASVS Verification
description: Apply OWASP ASVS Level 2 minimum for application security verification.

title: MITRE ATT&CK Framework
description: Map detection coverage to MITRE ATT&CK framework techniques.

title: MITRE D3FEND Framework
description: Apply MITRE D3FEND defensive techniques framework.

title: STIX/TAXII Threat Intel
description: Use STIX 2.1 / TAXII 2.1 for threat intelligence exchange.

title: CIS Critical Security Controls
description: Implement CIS Critical Security Controls v8 with implementation groups.

title: CIS Benchmarks
description: Apply CIS Benchmarks for OS and platform hardening.

title: California Consumer Privacy
description: Honor CCPA rights for California cybersecurity customers.

title: CPRA Sensitive Personal Info
description: Honor CPRA right to limit use of sensitive personal information.

title: Coordinated Vulnerability Disclosure
description: Maintain CVD policy per ISO/IEC 29147 for security researcher reports.

title: VEX Vulnerability Exploitability
description: Publish VEX (Vulnerability Exploitability eXchange) documents per CISA guidance.

title: SBOM Generation
description: Generate Software Bill of Materials per SPDX 2.3 / CycloneDX 1.5.

title: SLSA Supply Chain Levels
description: Achieve SLSA Level 3+ for software supply chain integrity.

title: EU Cyber Resilience Act
description: Comply with EU Cyber Resilience Act for products with digital elements.

title: CRA Vulnerability Notification
description: Notify ENISA of actively exploited vulnerabilities per CRA Article 14.

title: FTC Safeguards Rule for Non-Banks
description: Apply FTC Safeguards Rule to non-bank financial institutions.

title: State Breach Notification Laws
description: Comply with all 50 state breach notification laws when notifying victims.

title: PCI Software Security Framework
description: Apply PCI Software Security Framework for payment applications.

title: FIPS 140-3 Cryptographic Module
description: Use FIPS 140-3 validated cryptographic modules for federal customers.

title: Common Criteria Evaluation
description: Maintain Common Criteria EAL evaluation for security products.

title: BSI IT-Grundschutz
description: Apply BSI IT-Grundschutz baseline for German government clients.

title: BSI Cloud C5 Catalogue
description: Maintain BSI C5 attestation for German cloud customers.

title: Spanish ENS Compliance
description: Comply with Spanish ENS (Esquema Nacional de Seguridad) for public sector.

title: Canadian PIPEDA
description: Comply with PIPEDA for Canadian customer personal data.

title: Japanese APPI
description: Comply with Japanese Act on Protection of Personal Information.

title: China PIPL Compliance
description: Comply with China Personal Information Protection Law for Chinese data.

title: Brazilian LGPD
description: Comply with Brazilian Lei Geral de Proteção de Dados.

title: South African POPIA
description: Comply with Protection of Personal Information Act for South African data.

title: Cybersecurity Insurance
description: Maintain cybersecurity insurance with documented control attestations.

title: Liability Limitation Clauses
description: Apply enforceable liability limitation clauses in MSAs and SaaS agreements.

title: Customer Right-to-Audit
description: Define customer right-to-audit terms including notice and frequency.

title: BCP/DR Tabletop Exercises
description: Conduct annual BCP/DR tabletop exercises with documented results.

title: Annual Penetration Testing
description: Conduct annual third-party penetration testing with remediation tracking.

title: Bug Bounty Program
description: Maintain bug bounty program for crowd-sourced vulnerability discovery.

title: Code Signing Certificates
description: Sign all binaries and updates with EV code signing certificates.

title: Sigstore / SLSA Attestation
description: Sign artifacts with Sigstore Cosign and provide SLSA attestations.

title: AES-256 Encryption at Rest
description: Encrypt all customer data at rest with AES-256 or equivalent.

title: TLS 1.2 Minimum in Transit
description: Use TLS 1.2 minimum (TLS 1.3 preferred) for all data in transit.

title: Mandatory MFA
description: Require MFA for all administrative access and privileged operations.

title: Zero Trust Architecture
description: Apply NIST SP 800-207 zero trust architecture principles.

title: Endpoint Detection and Response
description: Deploy EDR on all endpoints with central monitoring.

title: SIEM Centralized Logging
description: Centralize logs in SIEM with correlation rules and 1+ year retention.

title: Patch Management SLA
description: Apply security patches within SLA (Critical: 7 days, High: 30 days).

title: Phishing Simulation Training
description: Conduct quarterly phishing simulation training with tracking.

title: Personnel Background Checks
description: Conduct background checks for all personnel with access to customer data.

title: Data Residency Controls
description: Provide data residency controls for EU/UK/CH/CA customer data.

title: EU-US Data Privacy Framework
description: Maintain EU-US Data Privacy Framework certification for transatlantic data.

title: EU AI Act for Cybersecurity AI
description: Apply EU AI Act high-risk classification to security AI systems where applicable.

title: Open Source License Compliance
description: Track open source dependencies with license compatibility analysis.

title: EU Whistleblower Directive
description: Maintain whistleblower channels per EU Directive 2019/1937.

title: Modern Slavery Statement
description: Publish annual modern slavery statement for UK businesses.

title: Sustainability Disclosures
description: Report sustainability per TCFD/CSRD where applicable.
